description: Track H5 — Materialized view acceleration dashboard. Answers the two questions the exec summary asks every week: 'How many queries did MVs save us?' and 'How much origin traffic did MVs kill?'. Pairs `shelf_mv_hits_total{mv_name}` with `shelf_mv_bytes_served_total{mv_name}` and compares them to the overall shim / origin surface. Feeds the MV advisor's post-hoc verification loop (H1).

panels.title: Total MV hits (24h)
panels.description: `sum(increase(shelf_mv_hits_total[24h]))` — number of cache hits served from pinned MV files in the last 24 hours.

panels.title: Bytes served by MVs (24h)
panels.description: `sum(increase(shelf_mv_bytes_served_total[24h]))`. Divide by total shim response bytes for the 'MV share of served traffic' KPI.

panels.title: MV share of shim response bytes (1h)
panels.description: How much of the bytes shelfd served to Trino came from an MV. Numerator is `shelf_mv_bytes_served_total`; denominator is the full shim surface `shelf_s3_shim_response_bytes_total`. Above 30% is the H-track ship bar.

panels.title: Active MVs (5m)
panels.description: Count of distinct `mv_name` labels that registered at least one hit in the last 5 minutes. Drifts downward after an MV is deprecated and traffic re-routes elsewhere.

panels.title: MV hits per second (top 10 MVs)
panels.description: Per-MV hit rate, top 10 by volume. Use to spot the MVs carrying the fleet and the ones about to be retired.

panels.title: Bytes served per MV (top 10)
panels.description: Per-MV bytes-served rate; complement of the hit-rate panel. Large spread between this and the hit panel means one MV is serving big rowgroups.

panels.title: MV scoreboard (24h)
panels.description: Per-MV totals for the last 24 hours. Sort by bytes-served to see which MVs the advisor (H1) should keep recommending and which ones are dead weight.

title: Shelf · Materialized View Acceleration
